'''Yorl Niba''' was a male [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] singer at the [[Starlight Theater]] on [[Phyrstal Island]] in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was openly hostile to [[Brinaloy N'Vaari]]. This was due to his envy over her ability to attract far greater crowds. Considering she was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] impersonating a Twi'lek, the insult was all the worse.
